home.title: Find, Access, and Use APIs to Build Your Projects or Applications.
home.description: A Web API platform providing ready-to-use endpoints that are fast, reliable, and easy to integrate into web applications, mobile apps, and backend systems.

about.title: About RHNX
about.description: RHNX is a modern platform designed to help you build websites quickly and efficiently. Everything is crafted for speed and simplicity.

ecosystem.subtitle: REST-api Ecosystem
ecosystem.title: REST-API ecosystem
ecosystem.description: AI, Downloader, Search, Tools and more connected in one modern REST API platform.

features.description: Build faster with modern API services designed for speed, stability, and easy integration
features.card1: Optimized infrastructure with lightweight responses,ultra fast processing,and stable real-time performance.
features.card2: Modern backend architecture with secure authentication and reliable endpoint protection.
features.card3: Clean REST endpoints with lightweight JSON responses for seamless developer integration.

folder.title: Alright, Let's Explore!
folder.description: Explore various REST API endpoints, send requests, and view responses in real time.

default.title: Alright, Let's Explore!
default.desc: Explore various REST API endpoints, send requests, and view responses in real-time.

ai.title: Explore AI
ai.desc: Artificial intelligence endpoints such as chatbots, AI image tools, text analysis, and smart automation.

tools.title: Utility Tools
tools.desc: Useful utilities including shortlink generators, converters, checkers, and automation APIs.

downloader.title: Media Downloader
downloader.desc: Download videos, audio, and media from various platforms easily.

games.title: Game API
games.desc: Collection of game endpoints, entertainment features, quizzes, and interactive fun APIs.

sticker.title: Sticker Generator
sticker.desc: Create WhatsApp stickers, edit images, and generate creative media instantly.

settings.title: API Settings
settings.desc: Manage accounts, API keys, user preferences, and other system configurations.

info.title: Information & Statistics
info.desc: View API information, server status, usage statistics, and endpoint details.

owner.title: Owner Management
owner.desc: Special owner endpoints to manage admins, users, permissions, and API systems.

islamic.title: Islamic Features
islamic.desc: Islamic features such as prayer schedules, duas, Qur'an, hadith, and religious content.

search.title: Search API
search.desc: Search endpoints to quickly find information and content.

example.title: Example Endpoints
example.desc: Example endpoints for testing requests, parameters, and API responses.

pricing.title: Flexible Pricing Plans for Your Needs
pricing.description: Choose an API plan that matches your usage scale. Start with free access for testing, or upgrade to premium plans with higher limits, faster performance, and priority support.

footer.description: Powerful and modern REST API services built for developers who need speed, simplicity, and scalability.
